subcodes.title: Words to Mrs. Tatum, spoken on 1912-08-21
subcodes.first_line: This is a sign of progress. The person who is satisfied with himself is the manifestation of Satan and the one who is not satisfied is the manifestation of the Merciful One.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این علامت ترقی است ان کس که خود راضی است شیطانست و انکه راضی نیست مظهر رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @progress only takes place within its own degree
